surface_verification.justification: No mounted-UI behavior change to smoke. The only client edit is a display-only backslash escape in CommandPreviewPanel, which is unmounted dead code (referenced only by its own test) — there is no route to render it. The server qCmd change is edge-case-only: outputs are byte-identical for normal titles/paths (existing tests unchanged) and the new backslash/quote behavior is covered by unit tests. CodeQL config effect is verified by the GitHub re-scan on the PR.

behaviors.behavior: qCmd doubles a trailing backslash before the closing quote
behaviors.evidence: server launcher.test.ts 'doubles a trailing backslash so it cannot escape the closing quote' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: qCmd applies the 2N+1 rule to backslashes before an embedded quote
behaviors.evidence: server launcher.test.ts 'applies the 2N+1 rule to backslashes that precede an embedded quote' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: qCmd preserves an interior backslash run without doubling (paths stay byte-identical)
behaviors.evidence: server launcher.test.ts 'preserves an interior backslash run (path) WITHOUT doubling it' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: qCmd escapes an embedded double quote
behaviors.evidence: server launcher.test.ts 'escapes an embedded double quote' + existing cmd.exe escape test PASSED

behaviors.behavior: qCmd doubles a pure trailing backslash run
behaviors.evidence: server launcher.test.ts 'doubles a pure trailing backslash run (2 -> 4)' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: CommandPreviewPanel escapes backslash-before-quote in the --name title preview
behaviors.evidence: client CommandPreviewPanel.test.tsx 'escapes a backslash before a quote in the --name title' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: codeql.yml and codeql-config.yml are valid YAML
behaviors.evidence: pyyaml safe_load of both files succeeded

behaviors.behavior: security-extended + paths-ignore drop the non-production CodeQL alerts
behaviors.reason: effect is only observable when GitHub's hosted CodeQL workflow re-scans the PR; verified post-merge on the Security tab
